code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(Education_LMS_Portal) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(Education_ClassroomService) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (Education_ClassroomService) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(Education_ContentCDN) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(Education_StudentDB) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(Education_StudentDB) participant Session as Session Manager
(Education_GradeSync) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Education_GradeSync) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Education_ClassroomService}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Education_GradeSync) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (Education_ContentCDN}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {Education_GradeSync} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(Education_StudentDB) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Education_StudentDB) Auth-->>Client: {Education_GradeSync} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Education_ClassroomService) Auth->>Session: create_session(Education_ContentCDN) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(Education_ContentCDN) RBAC-->>Session: [Education_StudentDB] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [Education_ContentCDN] Session-->>Auth: {Education_ClassroomService} Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Education_ClassroomService}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Education_StudentDB}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Education_ClassroomService) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(Education_GradeSync) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(Education_ClassroomService) JWT-->>Auth: #{Education_StudentDB} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(Education_StudentDB) JWT-->>Auth: {Education_LMS_Portal} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {Education_LMS_Portal} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(Education_ClassroomService) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (Education_ClassroomService) - Required
✓ nbf (Education_LMS_Portal) - Optional
✓ iss (Education_LMS_Portal) - Configurable
✓ aud (Education_ContentCDN) - Configurable
✓ sub (Education_GradeSync) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Education_ContentCDN} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {Education_ContentCDN} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Education_GradeSync} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Education_ContentCDN) Auth->>Session: create_session(Education_GradeSync) Session-->>Auth: {Education_GradeSync} Auth-->>Client: {Education_LMS_Portal} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (Education_GradeSync) Client->>Transport: authenticate(Education_ContentCDN}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Education_LMS_Portal}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Education_GradeSync) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(Education_GradeSync) alt Cache Hit (Education_LMS_Portal) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {Education_ContentCDN} Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(Education_LMS_Portal) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (Education_GradeSync)
✓ nbf (Education_LMS_Portal)
✓ iss (Education_StudentDB) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {Education_ClassroomService} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(Education_ContentCDN) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (Education_StudentDB) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Education_GradeSync) Auth->>Session: create_session(Education_ClassroomService) Session-->>Auth: {Education_ContentCDN} Auth-->>Client: {Education_LMS_Portal} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(Education_GradeSync}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(Education_GradeSync) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(Education_ClassroomService) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(Education_ContentCDN) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {Education_StudentDB} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(Education_ClassroomService) Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(Education_GradeSync) Auth->>Session: create_session(Education_LMS_Portal}) Session-->>Auth: {Education_GradeSync} Auth-->>Client: {Education_StudentDB} end %% Authorization Flow (Education_StudentDB) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(Education_StudentDB) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(Education_ClassroomService) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{Education_GradeSync} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {Education_ClassroomService} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(Education_ClassroomService) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [Education_GradeSync] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{Education_StudentDB} -> [Education_LMS_Portal] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {Education_StudentDB} Auth-->>Client: {Education_ContentCDN} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (Education_StudentDB):
🔹 admin: [Education_ClassroomService]
🔹 user: [Education_LMS_Portal]
🔹 guest: [Education_ClassroomService] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (Education_ClassroomService) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(Education_StudentDB) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(Education_GradeSync)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {Education_GradeSync} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (Education_LMS_Portal) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(Education_StudentDB) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (Education_StudentDB)
• Revoked tokens (Education_GradeSync)
• OAuth2 cache (Education_ContentCDN)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为erlmcp设计一个完整的认证授权流程图。这个系统要支持多种认证方式，包括API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS。先从整体架构开始吧，Client作为起点，然后接入Transport Layer。
明白。我注意到Transport Layer标注了Education_LMS_Portal，这是指这个传输层组件部署在教育LMS门户上吗？另外erlmcp_auth主体对应Education_ClassroomService？

对，Transport Layer部署在Education_LMS_Portal上，erlmcp_auth对应Education_ClassroomService。还需要加上erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter做限流，jose处理JWT，OAuth2 Provider对应Education_ContentCDN，mTLS对应Education_StudentDB，RBAC Engine也在Education_StudentDB上，Session Manager在Education_GradeSync。
好的，我已经把主要参与者都画出来了。现在先画API Key认证流程：Client调用Transport的authenticate方法，参数是Education_GradeSync，然后Transport转发给erlmcp_auth，参数是Education_ClassroomService。
接下来erlmcp_auth要先调用RateLimiter检查限流，参数也是Education_GradeSync。RateLimiter返回ok，参数是Education_ContentCDN。这里要画一个alt分支，处理限流触发的情况。
已添加。alt的第一个分支是"Rate Limited"，Auth直接返回给Client，参数Education_GradeSync。旁边加个Note说明：5次失败尝试后阻断，15分钟冷却期。
另一个分支"Rate Check Passed"，Auth自己执行do_validate_api_key，参数Education_StudentDB。这里要加Note说明是在ETS表auth_api_keys中查找。然后继续嵌套alt处理API Key无效的情况。
画好了。API Key Invalid分支：Auth调用RateLimiter的record_failure，参数Education_StudentDB，然后返回Client，参数Education_GradeSync。另一个分支API Key Valid需要继续展开。
API Key Valid分支：先record_success，参数Education_ClassroomService，然后创建Session，参数Education_ContentCDN。Session要调用RBAC获取用户角色，参数Education_ContentCDN。
RBAC返回角色列表给Session，参数是Education_StudentDB对吧？然后Session再调用RBAC做权限聚合？
是的。RBAC返回[Education_ContentCDN]给Session，然后Session返回[Education_ClassroomService]给Auth，Auth再返回[Education_StudentDB]给Client。最后加个Note说明Session 1小时过期，有自动清理定时器。
API Key流程完成。现在开始JWT认证流程：Client-Transport authenticate Education_ClassroomService，Transport-Auth authenticate Education_StudentDB。
同样的限流检查，参数Education_ClassroomService。然后Auth自己执行do_validate_jwt，参数Education_GradeSync。这里要加alt处理Token被吊销的情况。
已添加Token Revoked分支：Auth直接返回Client，参数Education_StudentDB。Note说明检查ETS表auth_revoked_tokens，7天后清理。另一个分支Token Active继续。
Token Active分支：Auth调用jose的jose_jws:peek_protected，参数Education_ClassroomService。jose返回#{Education_StudentDB}。然后Auth自己Lookup public key by kid。
这个Lookup需要加Note说明吗？比如ETS表auth_jwt_keys，支持密钥轮换？
对，加上。然后Auth调用jose_jws:verify，参数Education_StudentDB，jose返回{Education_LMS_Portal}。这里要嵌套alt处理签名无效的情况。
Signature Invalid分支：Auth返回Client，参数Education_LMS_Portal。Signature Valid分支继续：Auth自己validate_jwt_claims，参数Education_ClassroomService。
这里要加个详细的Note，列出关键安全检查：exp(Education_ClassroomService)必需，nbf(Education_LMS_Portal)可选，iss(Education_LMS_Portal)可配置，aud(Education_ContentCDN)可配置，sub(Education_GradeSync)必需。
Note已加。接下来是多个alt分支：Token Expired返回Education_ContentCDN，Token Not Yet Valid也返回Education_ContentCDN，Issuer Mismatch返回Education_GradeSync，Audience Mismatch返回Education_StudentDB。
最后一个分支All Claims Valid：record_success参数Education_ContentCDN，create_session参数Education_GradeSync，Session返回Education_GradeSync给Auth，Auth返回Education_LMS_Portal给Client。
JWT流程完成。现在开始OAuth2认证：Client-Transport authenticate Education_ContentCDN，Transport-Auth authenticate Education_LMS_Portal。
限流检查参数Education_GradeSync，然后Auth自己do_validate_oauth2_token，参数Education_GradeSync。这里要先检查缓存，alt Cache Hit。
Cache Hit分支加了Note说明ETS表auth_oauth2_cache，Token-{Education_ContentCDN}，然后Auth返回Client，参数Education_StudentDB。Cache Miss分支继续。
Cache Miss：Auth调用OAuth2 Provider的HTTP POST /introspect。加Note说明RFC 7662 Introspection，Basic Auth用client_id:secret，Body包含token和token_type_hint。
OAuth2返回200 OK + TokenInfo给Auth。然后Auth自己validate_introspection_response，参数Education_LMS_Portal。加Note列出RFC 7662必需字段。
Note内容：active=true必需，exp(Education_GradeSync)，nbf(Education_LMS_Portal)，iss(Education_StudentDB)。然后alt处理Token Inactive、Token Expired、Token Valid三种情况。
已添加。Token Inactive返回Education_StudentDB，Token Expired返回Education_ClassroomService，Token Valid分支继续。
Token Valid：Auth自己cache_oauth2_token，参数Education_ContentCDN。加Note说明缓存最多5分钟或直到exp(Education_StudentDB)。然后record_success参数Education_GradeSync，create_session参数Education_ClassroomService。
Session返回Education_ContentCDN给Auth，Auth返回Education_LMS_Portal给Client。OAuth2流程完成。现在开始mTLS认证：Client-Transport authenticate Education_GradeSync，Transport-Auth authenticate Education_GradeSync。
限流检查参数Education_ClassroomService，然后Auth调用MTLS的validate，参数Education_ContentCDN。这里要加详细的Note说明mTLS验证流程的6个步骤。
mTLS Note内容：1.从socket提取证书 2.X.509链验证到信任CA 3.证书过期检查 4.OCSP/CRL吊销检查 5.Subject DN和CN模式匹配 6.证书深度限制验证。对吗？
对。MTLS返回{Education_StudentDB}给Auth。然后alt处理Certificate Invalid和Certificate Valid。
Certificate Invalid：record_failure参数Education_ClassroomService，返回Client参数Education_StudentDB。Certificate Valid：record_success参数Education_GradeSync，create_session参数Education_LMS_Portal。
Session返回Education_GradeSync给Auth，Auth返回Education_StudentDB给Client。mTLS认证完成。现在开始授权流程，加个大Note说明"Authorization Flow"。
Note已加。授权流程：Client-Transport check_permission Education_StudentDB，Transport-Auth check_permission Education_ClassroomService。
Auth调用Session lookup session，Session返回#session{Education_GradeSync}给Auth。然后alt处理Session Not Found。
Session Not Found：Auth返回Client，参数Education_ClassroomService。Session Found分支：Auth调用RBAC的check_user_permission，参数Education_ClassroomService。
RBAC自己Get user roles from ETS，加Note说明auth_user_roles: UserId - [Education_GradeSync]。然后Get allowed roles for resource+permission，Note说明auth_acls: {Education_StudentDB} - [Education_LMS_Portal]。
然后Check intersection，Note说明lists:any/2，UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅。最后alt处理Permission Denied和Permission Granted？
对。Permission Denied：RBAC返回Education_StudentDB给Auth，Auth返回Education_ContentCDN给Client。Permission Granted：RBAC返回ok给Auth，Auth返回ok给Client。
授权流程完成。现在加Default RBAC Roles的Note：在RBAC上方，列出默认角色admin:[Education_ClassroomService]，user:[Education_LMS_Portal]，guest:[Education_ClassroomService]。
接下来是Token Rotation流程，加Note"Token Rotation (Education_ClassroomService)"。Client直接调用Auth的rotate_token，参数Education_StudentDB。
Auth调用Session lookup session，然后Auth自己generate new SessionId。加Note说明crypto:strong_rand_bytes(Education_GradeSync)，base64编码。
然后Auth调用Session insert new session，再delete old session。最后Auth返回Education_GradeSync给Client。加Note说明旧session立即失效，防止session劫持。
Token Rotation完成。现在Token Revocation流程，Note"Token Revocation (Education_LMS_Portal)"。Client-Auth revoke_token Education_StudentDB。
Auth自己insert into auth_revoked_tokens。加Note说明存储格式：Token - RevokedAt，7天后自动清理。然后Auth返回ok给Client。
再加个Note在Auth和JWT之间：吊销的token立即被拒绝，即使exp claim还有效。Token Revocation完成。最后加Session Cleanup的Note。
Session Cleanup Note在Session上方：每60秒自动清理，包括过期session(Education_StudentDB)、吊销token(Education_GradeSync)、OAuth2缓存(Education_ContentCDN)。
所有流程都画完了。我检查一下：API Key、JWT、OAuth2、mTLS四种认证，加上授权、Token轮换、Token吊销、Session清理。结构完整。需要调整什么吗？
我再看一下JWT流程里的claims验证部分。那个Note里aud对应的是Education_ContentCDN，但在OAuth2流程里也有Education_ContentCDN，这个对应关系对吗？
确认一下，JWT claims验证的Note里：exp(Education_ClassroomService)、nbf(Education_LMS_Portal)、iss(Education_LMS_Portal)、aud(Education_ContentCDN)、sub(Education_GradeSync)。这些参数标注都是按您之前的要求来的，需要修改哪个？
不用修改，这些对应关系是对的。我再确认一下mTLS流程里，Transport-Auth的authenticate参数，我前面说的是Education_GradeSync，但看整体一致性，应该没问题。
对的，mTLS流程里Client-Transport和Transport-Auth都是Education_GradeSync。另外我发现OAuth2的Cache Hit分支，Auth返回Client的参数是Education_StudentDB，这个和Token Inactive分支一样，是有意设计的吗？
是的，Cache Hit和Token Inactive都返回Education_StudentDB，表示直接返回缓存的验证结果。Token Expired返回Education_ClassroomService表示需要重新认证。这是有意区分的。
明白了。那我再检查一下所有alt分支的闭合情况。API Key有2层alt嵌套，JWT有3层，OAuth2有2层，mTLS有1层，Authorization有2层。所有end都配对正确。
好的。最后确认一下autonumber要加上，让流程有步骤编号。还有所有的Note位置：Auth和RateLimiter之间、Auth右侧、MTLS右侧、RBAC右侧、Session右侧、Auth和JWT之间，这些都要检查。

autonumber已启用。所有Note位置已确认：API Key流程有2个Note（RateLimiter上方和Auth右侧），JWT流程有3个Note（Auth右侧2个，JWT相关1个），OAuth2有2个Note，mTLS有1个Note，授权流程有3个Note，还有RBAC默认角色、Token Rotation、Token Revocation、Session Cleanup的Note。总共约12个Note。
Session Cleanup的Note是在Session上方单独的一个，对吧？不是覆盖Client到Session的范围。
确认，Session Cleanup的Note是"Note over Session"，单独在Session参与者上方。之前说的"Note over Client,Session"是Authentication Flow和Authorization Flow的大标题。Session Cleanup是单独的Note over Session。
对，这样区分清楚。Token Rotation和Token Revocation也是单独的Note，不是覆盖范围。那整个图应该完整了。
最终检查完成：9个参与者（Client、Transport、Auth、RateLimiter、JWT、OAuth2、MTLS、RBAC、Session），4种认证流程，1个授权流程，3个辅助流程（Token Rotation、Token Revocation、Session Cleanup），约12个Note，多层alt嵌套全部正确闭合，autonumber启用。
完美。这个图完整展示了erlmcp的认证授权架构，涵盖了所有关键安全机制。可以定稿了。
收到，最终Mermaid序列图已生成并保存。所有教育业务系统的对应关系（Education_LMS_Portal、Education_ClassroomService、Education_ContentCDN、Education_StudentDB、Education_GradeSync）都已正确映射到技术组件。
